reviews.comment:
Tardaron años en abrir el bar de la YPF full, ahora que está abierto podes tardar media hora para pedir un café y que te cobren. Aconsejo no ir, o ir solo cuando tenés mucho tiempo para perder.

(Translated by Google)
It took them years to open the YPF gas station bar, and now that it's open, you can spend half an hour just ordering a coffee and getting charged. I advise against going, or only going if you have a lot of time to waste.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURONmFUTi1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención para sacar el registro de conducir internacional, el tramite llevó menos de 10 minutos (llevando lo que piden en la pagina de ACA) muy amables y eficientes.
*no aceptan pago en efectivo

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service for obtaining an international driver's license. The process took less than 10 minutes (with the information requested on the ACA website). They were very friendly and efficient.
*They do not accept cash payments.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNUMExHMEd3EAE
